info.title: Location App API
info.description: Documentation Swagger / OpenAPI de l'API Location App

post.description: Change la méthode 2FA (nécessite reconfiguration).

post.summary:
POST /api/2fa/disable/
Body : { "code": "123456" } (code de vérification ou backup code)
post.description: Désactive la 2FA après vérification.

Pour TOTP: retourne le secret et le QR code
Pour EMAIL: envoie un code par email

POST /api/2fa/regenerate-backup/
Régénère les codes de secours (nécessite vérification).

get.description:
GET /api/2fa/status/
Retourne le statut de la 2FA pour l'utilisateur connecté.

post.description: Vérifie le code et active la 2FA si valide.

POST /api/auth/changer-password/
Body : { "ancien_password": "...", "nouveau_password": "..." }

POST /api/auth/login/
Body : { "email": "...", "password": "..." } ou { "username": "...", "password": "..." }

get.description:
GET /api/auth/profile/      → Retourne le profil spécialisé (selon le rôle).
PATCH /api/auth/profile/    → Met à jour le profil de l'utilisateur connecté.

patch.description:
GET /api/auth/profile/      → Retourne le profil spécialisé (selon le rôle).
PATCH /api/auth/profile/    → Met à jour le profil de l'utilisateur connecté.

post.description:
POST /api/auth/register/
Body : { "email": "...", "password": "...", "nom": "...", "prenom": "...", "role": "..." }

POST /api/auth/token/refresh/
Body : { "refresh": "..." }

POST /api/auth/token/verify/
Body : { "token": "..." }

GET    /api/biens/                    → liste (biens disponibles publics)
GET    /api/biens/recents/            → 5 derniers biens créés
POST   /api/biens/                    → créer un bien
GET    /api/biens/{id}/               → détail
PUT    /api/biens/{id}/               → modifier
DELETE /api/biens/{id}/               → supprimer
GET    /api/biens/{id}/bail/          → bails du bien
POST   /api/biens/{id}/photos/        → ajouter une photo (fichier ou base64)
DELETE /api/biens/{id}/photos/{pk}/   → supprimer une photo
POST   /api/biens/{id}/videos/        → ajouter une vidéo
DELETE /api/biens/{id}/videos/{pk}/   → supprimer une vidéo

get.description: GET /api/biens/{id}/bail/ — Liste les bails du bien.

delete.description:
DELETE /api/biens/{id}/photos/{photo_pk}/
Supprime une photo du bien.

post.summary:
POST /api/biens/{id}/videos/
Upload une ou plusieurs vidéos pour le bien.
post.description:
Multipart form-data:
- video: fichier vidéo (MP4, AVI, MOV, WEBM)
- thumbnail: miniature (optionnel)
- titre: titre de la vidéo (optionnel)
- description: description (optionnel)
- duree: durée en secondes (optionnel)
- ordre: ordre d'affichage (optionnel, d'éfaut 0)

delete.description:
DELETE /api/biens/{id}/videos/{video_pk}/
Supprime une vidéo du bien.

post.description:
Check the credentials and return the REST Token
if the credentials are valid and authenticated.
Calls Django Auth login method to register User ID
in Django session framework

Accept the following POST parameters: username, password
Return the REST Framework Token Object's key.

get.summary:
Calls Django logout method and delete the Token object
assigned to the current User object.
get.description: Accepts/Returns nothing.

post.summary:
Calls Django logout method and delete the Token object
assigned to the current User object.
post.description: Accepts/Returns nothing.

post.summary: Calls Django Auth SetPasswordForm save method.
post.description:
Accepts the following POST parameters: new_password1, new_password2
Returns the success/fail message.

post.summary: Calls Django Auth PasswordResetForm save method.
post.description:
Accepts the following POST parameters: email
Returns the success/fail message.

post.summary:
Password reset e-mail link is confirmed, therefore
this resets the user's password.
post.description:
Accepts the following POST parameters: token, uid,
    new_password1, new_password2
Returns the success/fail message.
Accepts the following POST parameters: username, email, password1, password2.

post.summary: Resends another email to an unverified email.
post.description: Accepts the following POST parameter: email.

post.summary: Verifies the email associated with the provided key.
post.description: Accepts the following POST parameter: key.

Takes a token and indicates if it is valid.  This view provides no
information about a token's fitness for a particular use.

get.summary:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.
get.description:
Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.

put.summary:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.
put.description:
Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.

patch.summary:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.
patch.description:
Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.
